summary: Iteration 16 - Field Operations production-readiness. Backend 10/10 PASSED (login, checklist templates with 3 types/items, OS create+GET with causa_falha/equipamento_parado/horas_parada, list includes new fields, sectors/kpis/dashboard regression, manifest.json & service-worker.js accessible). Frontend: login works, Kanban /os shows 5 columns including 'Em Execução', Nova OS modal exposes all 6 tipos, mandatory Disciplina, Causa da Falha field, Equipamento Parado radio (Sim/Não), and Horas de Parada appears only when Sim is selected. /inspecoes Nova Inspeção modal has 3 tabs (Mecânica 10 itens, Elétrica 10 itens, Lubrificação 9 itens) and the checklist preview updates per tab. PWA meta tags present (manifest, theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable) and service worker is active.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer warnings persist on first paint: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' (pre-existing from iter15).

OS card #2026-00041 (AUDIT-OS-EMERG) still displays legacy tipo label 'Emergência' which is no longer a valid OSTipo enum value — likely seeded/legacy data that should be migrated or filtered to one of the 6 new tipos.

action_items: Optional: migrate legacy OS docs with tipo='emergencia' to one of the new 6 OSTipo values to avoid label leak in Kanban cards.
Optional (carryover from iter15): fix Recharts initial sizing warnings on Dashboard.
Optional: add data-testid attributes on Nova OS / Nova Inspeção tabs and fields to make future regression tests more robust.
critical_code_review_comments: service-worker.js caches API responses under a single API_CACHE — multi-tenant orgs could see cross-tenant cache hits when offline if a different user signs in on the same device. Consider scoping cache by org_id or clearing caches on logout.
offlineQueue.js retries up to 5 times then marks 'failed' but provides no UI surfacing of failed ops — users may lose data silently. Add a 'failed sync' indicator in NetworkStatus.
DEFAULT_CHECKLISTS in server.py duplicates business data inside the application file — consider moving to a seed module or JSON config to allow non-admin localization without code change.
PUT /api/checklists/templates/{tipo} does not validate tipo against {mecanica, eletrica, lubrificacao} — could allow arbitrary template keys to be created.
App.js is reportedly >1500 lines (Modals + components inline) — exceeds 700-line guideline; split into per-modal components and lib files.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the listed flows (login, /os Kanban, Nova OS new fields incl. dynamic Horas de Parada, /inspecoes Nova Inspeção 3 tabs with checklist preview, PWA meta + active SW)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed OS entries and delete them after assertions. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 (PWA + field ops new fields + checklist templates + 3-tab inspection modal) is fully working both backend and frontend. Use /app/backend/tests/test_iteration16_field_ops.py for regression. The only carryover items are cosmetic: legacy 'emergencia' tipo still appears on at least one seeded OS card; Recharts initial paint warnings. Nova OS POST requires field 'titulo' (mandatory) in addition to descricao.
